prompt:
Reference image role: the project list prototype defines our project-thumbnail visual DNA — dark ink-green base, abstract glowing tech motif on the right, mossy/firefly accents, restrained Eastern xianxia + tech fusion. PRESERVE this DNA. Each project cover is a 16:9 atmospheric banner with one recognizable tech metaphor at the right and quiet space at left.

Create a 16:9 project cover image for "Megatron 并行机制笔记 / Megatron-LM Deployment". NO text, NO logos.

Subject: A central glowing ancient tree at the right, but its branches split into perfectly symmetric parallel circuit-like paths flowing downward and outward (suggesting model parallelism). Each branch has tiny glowing nodes in firefly cyan #9CF0BD and warm gold #C0A35D. Behind the tree, faint hexagonal mesh patterns in deep teal suggest distributed compute. Bottom-left foreground has a soft glowing data node.

Composition: subject on right 60%, left 40% intentionally dark and quiet for HTML text overlay. Cinematic atmosphere, low-key, professional, NOT game UI.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, wood #24180F, glow #9CF0BD, gold #C0A35D, accent jade #6A9580.

Avoid: real company logos, readable text, characters, neon, purple, red, cartoonish, MMORPG, oversaturated, modern flat illustration.
